## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe the change and the problem it solves. -->

## Changes

Use concise bullets for the important implementation details, for example:

## User And Maintainer Impact

<!-- Note any API, behavior, packaging, documentation, release, or operational impact. -->

## Risk And Compatibility

<!--
Call out migration concerns, compatibility risks, or intentionally unchanged behavior.

## Verification

<!-- List the commands or CI jobs used to validate the change, including relevant pass/fail results. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally or in CI.
- [ ] Documentation is updated for behavior, workflow, or public API changes.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated for user-visible changes.
- [ ] Type stubs are updated when public API or `evocore._core` exports change.
- [ ] Release, packaging, seed, checkpoint, and serialization impact has been considered.
